editTopo.py edits file version 1

  205  313  325.5453186035156  0.0
  205  312  386.1728515625     0.0
  207  308  575.3291015625     0.0
# These edits are from OM2 topography
# Most of these edits revert the new topography to the values in the previous topography 
# /g/data/ik11/inputs/access-om2/input_20200530/mom_1deg/topog.nc
# at selected points in Denmark Strait, Iceland-Faroe Strait, the Strait of Gibraltar,
# the Lombok, Ombai, Timor, Makassar Straits, the Caribbean, Drake Passage, and a few others.
# The edits in the Red Sea and at (i  j) = (207  295) in the Northwest Passage are the only ones not from the old topography.
# see https://github.com/COSIMA/access-om2/issues/158#issuecomment-669624837
